ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of The Estate
Off Calendar Aug-31-2021 Off Calendar

Petition For Determination Of Entitlement Of Estate Distribution (Probate Code Section 11700)
Off Calendar Sep-07-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Laurence Blau, via ZOOM, for Cathy Flight, via ZOOM, Personal Representative.

The court begins by asking if there are any objections. None are presented with Mr. Blau advising that he has no knowledge of any existing objections. The court then advises Mr. Blau that the court intends to approve only the settlement agreement and not the determination of entitlement. Mr. Blau provides oral testimony regarding the history of this matter and reports that he intends to file a petition for final distribution, regardless. The court reconfirms Mr. Blau's plan to file a separate petition for final distribution and then vacates the status on close of estate currently set for 9/08/2021 as a new date on status of close will be set once the petition for final distribution is filed.

The Petition for Determination, etc., is submitted.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

Petition For Determination Of Entitlement Of Estate Distribution (Probate Code Section 11700)
Off Calendar Jun-01-2021 Continued To Jul-13-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Laurence Blau, via ZOOM, counsel for Cathy Flight, via ZOOM, Petitioner.

The court at the outset questions whether the court has the authority to order distribution as stated in the [proposes] order submitted to the court. Counsel reports that the idea was for the court to determine the beneficiaries, heirs and charities named in the holographic will. Counsel presents additional oral argument in support of the petition. The court then advises counsel that he might consider amending the petition and submitting a revised [proposed] order.

After additional discussion, the Petition for Determination of Entitlement of Estate Distribution is continued to July 13, 2021 at 9:00 am in Department 204.

Judge: Hon. Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.
